raw:
## Completed
Implemented `extensions/AskUserQuestion/` pi extension with:
- Tool named exactly `AskUserQuestion`
- Claude Code-style schema
- Interactive `ctx.ui.custom` dialog flow
- Pure exported selection/result logic
- Headless fallback
- Unit test for selection logic, notes, and fallback shape

## Files Changed
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts` - registers the tool and renders the interactive UI using `ctx.ui.custom` plus `Container`, `Text`, and `Input` from `pi-tui`.
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/logic.ts` - pure unit-testable selection/result logic.
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh` - runnable logic tests.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh`

## Notes
Verification passed locally.
